name: pm-scripts
description: Validation and reporting scripts for the PM folder. Add the `pm:lint` and `pm:dash` scripts to the project's root package.json.

scripts.pm:all: node validate-frontmatter.js && node generate-monitor.js && node generate-dashboard.js

note: These scripts are dependency-free (Node stdlib only). Wire into the project's root package.json: "pm:lint": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/validate-frontmatter.js", "pm:dash": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/generate-dashboard.js", "pm:monitor": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/generate-monitor.js", "pm:map": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/generate-codebase-map.js", "pm:board": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/generate-backlog-board.js", "pm:all": "npm run pm:lint && npm run pm:monitor && npm run pm:dash", "pm:claude-scaffold": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/claude-scaffold.js", "pm:claude-audit": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/claude-audit.js", "pm:claude-hooks": "node _00-Project-Management/93-Scripts/install-hooks.js". pm:board (STORY-01.1.06) generates the throwaway interactive backlog board at 41-Reports/BACKLOG-BOARD.html; pm:claude-audit/pm:claude-hooks (STORY-01.5.03) report CLAUDE.md coverage + install the warn-only pre-commit hook. pm:monitor (BUG-20260524-01) regenerates MONITOR.md's count rollups (overall bar, per-epic table, counts snapshot, WIP) between managed markers from live frontmatter — run it (or pm:all) after creating/deleting artefacts, not only on close-out. Optionally add a Husky pre-commit hook to run pm:all on every commit.
